title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Spencer's Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
